name: 单位率
subject: math
domain_name: 比率与比例 / Ratios & Proportions / Ratios & Proportions
curriculum_points: 6.RP.2 Understand the concept of a unit rate a/b associated with a ratio a:b with b ≠ 0, and use rate language in the context of a ratio relationship.
6.RP.3.b Solve unit rate problems including those involving unit pricing and constant speed.
